blocks.content: Three seconds. Five. Long enough for it to become a thing.
I drifted to a table near the back and sat down. Nobody said anything. I didn't say anything to anyone.

blocks.speaker: Junior
blocks.content: I can see that. You should go over there.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I know what table it is.
He shrugged and left. At the center table Jonathan was mid-story, hands moving, the whole room leaning in. He didn't scan for me again.

blocks.text: is going to have to figure something out.

blocks.prompt: What does Larry do for the rest of lunch?

options.label: Watch Jonathan. Figure out how he does it.
Look busy. Don't let it show.
